acknowledged_affected_count.description: The affected-user count from workflows-blast-radius that you showed the user AND they explicitly confirmed before you called this — never size and fire in one step. Rejected if it no longer matches the current audience, forcing a re-check.

projectId.description: Override the active project for this single call only. Does not change the active project — use switch-project for a persistent change. Defaults to the active project when omitted. Must be a project the API key can access, or the call returns a permission error.

variables.description: Optional {key: value} variable overrides for this run; defaults to the workflow definition.

workflow_id.description: ID of the batch workflow to run now.
